title: Performance Enhancer Next Mods - PENM
description: Features a recopilation of the best mods of each version without forgetting the performace. So that your toaster can keeps the toasts going on!
body:

| **[PENC](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penc)** | **Yes**  (Best performace) | **No**  (It totally changes the game) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **Yes**  (Only has Create) | Vanilla Create experience |

| **[PENC Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penc-vulkan)** | **Yes**  (Best performace with Vulkan) | **No**  (It totally changes the game) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **Yes**  (Only has Create) | Vanilla Create experience |

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/penm-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENM-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Description**
**Ever wanted to play a modpack that has one of the following?** Combat / magic / decoration / engineering / performance / dynamism / funny / minecrafty
**Why not have it all together?**

This modpacks aims to bring fresh air to minecraft, featuring all the available mods I found in each version, from the 1.14.4 onwards for Fabric, Forge, Quilt and Neoforge, that are up to the task of making the best modpack possible (from my perspective), so you don't have to, and you only do the enjoyable part, playing, yourself or with your imaginary friends!

### **Important**

<details>
<summary>Recommendations</summary>

- The game comes preconfigurated to best performance and whith most keybinds unbounded so that you can configure it to your likings.
- Just use one backpack per player.
- Don't use Minecraft built in tp's, use the waystones instead.
- If you place a waystone, you mustn't move it! You can only "reacomate" it.
- - Right usage e.g. you place a waystone in your base, and when you make your house you "reacomodate" it so that it is inside your house.
- - Wrong usage e.g. you place a waystone in your base and always have one in your inventory when you explore, so you can put it to go back to base, and after using it you break it to use it later.
- Use Chunky to pregenerate the world and any dimensions you'd like so that the client / server doesn't need to generate the world in your face generating lag and low fps, [Github wiki](github.com/pop4959/Chunky/wiki/Commands).
- If you want to back up your wolrd (client or server) use Fastback, it makes it quicker and easier, [Github wiki](pcal43.github.io/fastback/usage.html).
- If playing on a server use the `/gamerule playersSleepingPercentage 0` so that you can pass the night with just one player sleeping.
- **If you dislike any mod or want to add one**, don't think it twice! Just go to the options of the profile and 'unpair' it, so that you can add and remove mods on your own will.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Old versions WON'T RUN UNLESS you open them with Java 17</summary>

Versions prior to 1.17 **(exluding Forge versions 1.14.4 • 1.15.2)**, must use Java 17, otherwise the game won't start.

How to cahnge the Java version in the Modrinth Launcher:

Select the Instance you want to run >>> Go to 'options' >>> Under the Java section, check 'override global Java instances' >>> Click on 'auto detect' and choose a Java installation that is in the 17.0 or newer.

If you don't see any:

Go to the general settings of the launcher (the gear) >>> Under the Java settings section, click 'Install recomended' next to 'Java 17 location' >>> Then do the previous steps.

</details>

<details>
<summary>To enable Simple Voice Chat and AutoModpack mods</summary>

You will have to port forward the following ports on the server:

Simple Voice Chat >>> Port: `24454`. Protocol: `UDP`.

AutoModpack >>> Port: `30037`. Protocol: `TCP`.

If you don't now how search for a tutorial. Yes, I know I'm not being helpfull over there but the thing is it varies on the server page. Join my Discord so someone may help you, [Discord invite link](https://discord.gg/HFatSHXhJf).

</details>

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/penm-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENM-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Other modpacks**

**Interested only in the performance? Try out [PEN](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pen) or [PEN+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penplus).**

**Want only performance and Create? Try out [PENC](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penc) or [PENC+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pencplus).**

**[Check the Vulkan version of my modpakcs.](https://modrinth.com/user/AselElisian/modpacks)**

### **Recommended modpacks**
**Looking for a themed modpack? Try out [Kuzaa's modpacks](https://modrinth.com/user/Kuzaa/modpacks).**

# **License**
Do not redistribute from outside of Modrinth, I may upload the modpack to CurseForge in the future.

You can use the modpack to begin a new one if you link back this page.

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/penm-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENM-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Credits**
All the mods used are not mine, I am simply messengers that ease the making of a modpack. The hard work is made by the modders. Please thank them as I do, and if you very like a mod go to its page and support the creator.

# **FAQ**

<details>
<summary></summary>

>Q: Why would I play your random modpack?
>
>A: The BMBP modpack always look to bring the best experience available trying to exceed each previous editions when updated. It aims to be the most enjoyable experience.

>Q: Where can I send you my feedback (or hatred threat)?
>
>A: Currently, via twitter, using #PENM or sending a message to @AselElisian or on [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/HFatSHXhJf). Note that I only speak english and spanish.

</details>
